title: lotus scoparius subsp. brevialatus
intro: Lotus scoparius subsp. brevialatus, also known as the mountain silver lotus or low silver lotus, is a subspecies of the lotus scoparius plant, a flowering plant in the pea family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of lotus scoparius subsp. brevialatus include reducing inflammation, supporting immune function, and potentially aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and salves.
